---
title: "Cancer Type Classification with Multinomial Elastic Net"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  cache = TRUE
)

```

```{r}
#1. Load packages
library(glmnet)
library(irlba)
library(caret)
```

```{r}
#2. Read data
train <- read.csv("train.csv", check.names = FALSE)
test <- read.csv("test.csv", check.names = FALSE)

dim(train)
dim(test)
head(train[, 1:5])
```

```{r}
#3. Prepare response and predictors
y <- as.factor(train$cancer)

x_train <- as.matrix(
  train[, setdiff(names(train), c("id", "cancer")), drop = FALSE]
)

x_test <- as.matrix(
  test[, setdiff(names(test), "id"), drop = FALSE]
)

common_cols <- intersect(colnames(x_train), colnames(x_test))
x_train <- x_train[, common_cols, drop = FALSE]
x_test <- x_test[, common_cols, drop = FALSE]

col_var <- apply(x_train, 2, var)
keep <- !is.na(col_var) & col_var > 0

x_train <- x_train[, keep, drop = FALSE]
x_test <- x_test[, keep, drop = FALSE]

dim(x_train)
dim(x_test)
table(y)
```

```{r cache=TRUE}
#4. Fit model or load saved model
set.seed(314)

if (file.exists("fit_cv.rds")) {
  fit_cv <- readRDS("fit_cv.rds")
} else {
  fit_cv <- cv.glmnet(
    x = x_train,
    y = y,
    family = "multinomial",
    alpha = 0.5,
    nfolds = 3,
    nlambda = 50,
    standardize = TRUE,
    type.measure = "class"
  )
  
  saveRDS(fit_cv, "fit_cv.rds")
}
```

```{r}
#5. Cross-validation plot
library(glmnet)

fit_cv <- readRDS("fit_cv.rds")
plot(fit_cv)
```

```{r cache=TRUE}
#6. PCA visualization
x_pca <- train[, setdiff(names(train), c("id", "cancer")), drop = FALSE]

var_rank <- apply(x_pca, 2, var, na.rm = TRUE)
var_rank <- sort(var_rank, decreasing = TRUE)

top_genes <- names(var_rank)[1:1000]
x_top <- x_pca[, top_genes, drop = FALSE]
x_top <- scale(x_top)

pca_fast <- prcomp_irlba(x_top, n = 2)

plot(
  pca_fast$x[, 1],
  pca_fast$x[, 2],
  col = y,
  pch = 16,
  xlab = "PC1",
  ylab = "PC2"
)

legend(
  "topright",
  legend = levels(y),
  col = 1:length(levels(y)),
  pch = 16
)
```

```{r cache=TRUE}
#7. Generate test predictions
pred <- predict(
  fit_cv,
  newx = x_test,
  s = "lambda.min",
  type = "class"
)

submission <- data.frame(
  id = test$id,
  cancer = as.integer(pred)
)

head(submission)
```

```{r}
#8. Save submission file
# write.csv(submission, "submission_glmnet.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
#9. Important genes
coef_min <- coef(fit_cv, s = "lambda.min")

top_features <- lapply(coef_min, function(m) {
  df <- data.frame(
    gene = rownames(m),
    coef = as.numeric(m)
  )
  df <- df[df$gene != "(Intercept)", ]
  df <- df[order(abs(df$coef), decreasing = TRUE), ]
  head(df, 10)
})

top_features
```

```{r cache=TRUE}
## 10. Validation performance
set.seed(314)

if (file.exists("perf_results.rds")) {
  perf_results <- readRDS("perf_results.rds")
} else {
  perf_idx <- caret::createDataPartition(y, p = 0.8, list = FALSE)

  x_tr_perf <- x_train[perf_idx, , drop = FALSE]
  y_tr_perf <- y[perf_idx]

  x_val_perf <- x_train[-perf_idx, , drop = FALSE]
  y_val_perf <- y[-perf_idx]

  fit_perf <- cv.glmnet(
    x = x_tr_perf,
    y = y_tr_perf,
    family = "multinomial",
    alpha = 0.5,
    nfolds = 3,
    nlambda = 50,
    standardize = TRUE,
    type.measure = "class"
  )

  pred_valid <- predict(
    fit_perf,
    newx = x_val_perf,
    s = "lambda.min",
    type = "class"
  )

  pred_valid <- as.vector(pred_valid)
  y_valid <- as.vector(y_val_perf)

  cm <- table(y_valid, pred_valid)
  accuracy <- sum(diag(cm)) / sum(cm)

  precision <- diag(cm) / colSums(cm)
  recall <- diag(cm) / rowSums(cm)
  f1 <- 2 * precision * recall / (precision + recall)

  metrics <- data.frame(
    Class = rownames(cm),
    Precision = precision,
    Recall = recall,
    F1 = f1
  )

  macro_precision <- mean(precision, na.rm = TRUE)
  macro_recall <- mean(recall, na.rm = TRUE)
  macro_f1 <- mean(f1, na.rm = TRUE)

  perf_results <- list(
    cm = cm,
    accuracy = accuracy,
    metrics = metrics,
    macro_precision = macro_precision,
    macro_recall = macro_recall,
    macro_f1 = macro_f1
  )

  saveRDS(perf_results, "perf_results.rds")
}
```

```{r}
#11. Confusion matrix
perf_results$cm
```

```{r}
#12. Accuracy
perf_results$accuracy
```

```{r}
#13. Precision, recall, and F1 by class
perf_results$metrics
```

```{r}
#14. Macro-averaged metrics
perf_results$macro_precision
perf_results$macro_recall
perf_results$macro_f1
```
